title: Brachyloma rhynchocarpum
taxonomy: Brachyloma rhynchocarpum is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is native to Australia. This plant is part of the genus Brachyloma, which includes several other species of heath plants. Brachyloma rhynchocarpum is commonly found in heath and woodland habitats in its native region. The classification of Brachyloma rhynchocarpum reflects its unique characteristics and relationships within the plant kingdom.
